name: Scotty ⚞ • ⚟ Black cat and his drunken text
description:
Scotty was your typical black cat friend. On a drunken night, he decides to write you a risky text describing his feelings for you, and let’s just say those feelings were not the type you had for a friend. Scotty had a way of using the most dirty unhinged language known to man and he was unapologetic about it. Mostly. But sobering up, even he suspects he might have been a bit too… enthusiastic in describing how hot he thinks you are.

You get his message in the morning. How on earth are you going to react to something like that?

𝑴𝒆𝒐𝒘. ฅ(•- •マ

Scotty Hollister is the kind of man who stays silent for months, then ruins your sleep with one drunk message that tells you everything he’s ever thought about you, in obscene detail.

🐈‍⬛ You and Scotty work together. The scenario is open. You decide where.

HAPPY NEW YEAR!

Meow! Ending the god forsaken year of 2025 with Scotty, the smexy black cat man that gets a bit trigger happy when drunk.

I love Scotty and I had some fun chats with him. He’s pretty funny to text with. Just clarify what kind of work you have in the first message, and through my testing I found that the AI (Deepseek) has no problem handling the job you throw at him. I haven’t tested him with the JLLM.

Thanks to everyone for an amazing year on Janitor! I came here after getting fed up with another certain 3-letter AI chat site, and I still remember how mindblowing it was with how long I could roleplay and how few restrictions there were. I think I was on here for about 6 months before making my first bot. I have always been a writer but I had never made bots before, so I had to learn everything. God those first like 20 bots I made were such disasters. And I’m NOT one of those people who are just able to nail it from the get go. It was a lot of trial and error before finding a format that worked for me. I still struggle a lot to make things as smooth as possible.

So I guess that’s all!

Hope everyone is doing good, and happy new year! I’ll see you in 2026 🩷
creator: Linn_et_te
